notes: AR1000F Full Year Resident Individual Income Tax Return from AR DFA.
Page 1 is the identity + income lines, page 2 is deductions/credits, page 3 is payments/refund.
Widget names use F_NR-{page}-{index} pattern. The form is shared with AR1000NR (nonresident).
Filing status checkboxes are F_NR-1-22 through F_NR-1-25 area but the exact mapping to Single/MFJ/etc requires inspection of the on-state values.

Key line mappings: F_NR-1-48=Line 1 (wages), F_NR-1-70=Line 23 (AR AGI), F_NR0-2-29=Line 24A (std ded), F_NR0-2-31=Line 25 (AR taxable income), F_NR-3-1=Line 26 (tax from table), F_NR-3-17=Line 42 (total tax).

state_total_tax.note: Total AR income tax (line 42) — state_total_tax from plugin
